commands.review_summary:
The PR changes auto-reply memory-flush failure handling to log visible flush errors, continue the main reply, rotate exhausted sessions while preserving transcripts, clear stale flush state, and document expanded `notifyUser` behavior.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +392, Docs 0. Total +436 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main collects visible memory-flush error payloads and fails the reply before the main run. The PR body also provides after-fix Gateway/WebSocket proof where a failing mock flush provider no longer aborts user replies.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of compatibility-sensitive reply delivery, session recovery, and existing-setting notice semantics; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.
